rationale: ADR/process conformance is clean. All five cited ADRs (0040/0037/0036/0035/0034) exist, are Accepted, and each names the sole impacted domain `workflow` in Domain(s); `validate plan` on the branch binary exits 0 with only the BRIEF-anticipated advisory WARN (decomposition-scope-redundancy R=0.04) — no adr-cite-irrelevant, no adr-coverage-missing. Deliberate omissions are documented and accurate against internal/validate: ADR-0039 intersects workflow but 111 adds no `.mindspec/` layout logic (gate-safe, reasoned); ADR-0030 (execution) and ADR-0027 (observability) do not intersect workflow, so citing either would fire adr-cite-irrelevant — both statements correct. Steps per bead are 3/6/5 (all <=7). work_chunks shape {depends_on,id,key_file_paths} and the simple-ID adr_citations form match the approved 110 plan exactly; Draft status correctly lacks the approve-stamped fields. Mode is `plan`, activeSpec 111 — plan approve is runnable. Doc-sync is gate-forward-conformant (disjoint architecture/interfaces/runbook regions, all in key_file_paths).
findings: Cited ADRs verified against .mindspec/adr/: 0040 (Accepted; core,workflow), 0037 (Accepted; workflow,execution), 0036 (Accepted; workflow,validation,doc-sync,ownership), 0035 (Accepted; workflow,execution,core), 0034 (Accepted; workflow). All intersect the sole impacted domain `workflow`.

checkADRCitations/checkADRCoverage semantics confirmed in internal/validate/plan.go: irrelevant fires only on a cited non-intersecting ADR (none here); coverage-missing fires only if an impacted domain has no cited Accepted covering ADR (workflow covered 5x). validate plan exits 0.

Deliberate omissions documented and gate-accurate: ADR-0039 (Accepted, DOES intersect workflow) reasoned out as non-constraining — gate-safe since coverage doesn't require citing every workflow ADR; ADR-0030 and ADR-0027 correctly stated as non-intersecting (would trip adr-cite-irrelevant). ~20 other workflow-domain ADRs are not enumerated, but the gate does not require it and the three plausibly-adjacent ones are addressed.
Steps per bead: Bead 1 = 3, Bead 2 = 6, Bead 3 = 5 — all <= 7.

Frontmatter/work_chunks shape matches approved 110 plan (work_chunks = {depends_on,id,key_file_paths}; adr_citations simple-ID list). Draft status correctly omits approve-stamped approved_at/approved_by/bead_ids.
Lifecycle mode is `plan` with activeSpec 111-workflow-panel-runner; plan-approve gate is runnable once panel passes.

Doc-sync gate-forward: each bead appends to a disjoint workflow domain doc (architecture.md / interfaces.md / runbook.md), each present in the bead's key_file_paths and verified by a git-show membership grep — ADR-0036-conformant.

INFO (non-blocking, not a change request): the plan (Testing Strategy, Regression para) predicts `validate plan` will emit a non-gating `missing-source-globs` WARN; it did not fire on the branch binary. Harmless over-prediction — the plan is cleaner than stated, no conformance impact.
